assumptions: The receiving role uses tracked fixture evidence only
No hidden context is required beyond listed artifacts and evidence links

decisions.description: reviewer accepts or blocks the handoff explicitly

openRisks.description: Fixture evidence can become stale if task ids change
openRisks.mitigation: Re-run Rust validation before accepting downstream work

acceptanceChecklist.description: All required evidence links are present and fixture-scoped
Handoff does not grant apply, merge, command, or browser write authority

nextRecommendedAction: Reviewer inspects listed evidence, records an explicit decision, and stops if evidence is stale or missing.
boundary: advisory handoff evidence only; it does not execute commands, lock files, write trusted state, apply changes, merge branches, spawn agents, or grant production authority
